commands.review_summary:
The branch updates the Codex native `PostToolUse` relay and focused tests so active `codex` tool-result middleware can run for native tool completions.

PR surface: Source +103, Tests +118. Total +221 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. At source level, current main and `v2026.6.9` skip middleware-only native `post_tool_use` work, and the PR's amended response path is traceable against upstream Codex as a blocking result.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The branch needs a code fix plus contributor-visible real behavior proof, so it should stay in human review rather than a repair marker while proof is insufficient.

target.title: fix(codex): run native post-tool middleware
target.author: monkeyleet
